notes: The sfx['1up'] is written as sfx.1up() which is invalid JS syntax causing a fatal parse error, preventing the game from running at all in most browsers.

An absolutely flawless implementation of Asteroids, featuring accurate vector-style rendering with phosphor trails, complete Web Audio synthesis for all classic sound effects (including the accelerating heartbeat), perfect screen-wrapping math, and arcade-accurate UFO and splitting mechanics.

Feature set is unusually complete and mostly solid, but strict scoring is reduced for title-screen shape regeneration flicker, slight state/high-score inconsistencies, nonstandard one-shot firing behavior, and some gameplay/audio polish issues.
